fields.label: Learner
fields.description: Lookup to the learner Contact this nudge was sent for. Required. Added June 2026.
fields.inlineHelpText: Select the learner this nudge was sent to.

fields.label: Course Work ID
fields.description: Google Classroom assignment ID this nudge is for. Required. Part of dedup constraint. Added June 2026.
fields.inlineHelpText: The Google Classroom assignment ID. Set automatically by the nudge system.

fields.label: Nudge Date
fields.description: Date this nudge was scheduled for. Required. Part of dedup constraint — one nudge per learner per assignment per day. Added June 2026.
fields.inlineHelpText: The date this nudge was scheduled. One nudge per learner per assignment per day is allowed.

fields.label: Sent At
fields.description: Exact date and time the nudge was sent. Required. Set automatically when dispatched. Added June 2026.
fields.inlineHelpText: The exact time this nudge was sent. Set automatically.
